page_type.review_reason: This is the initial HTML shell of Instagram with no main content visible. Content is likely loaded dynamically via JavaScript after page load.

ground_truth.title: Instagram
ground_truth.main_content: This HTML contains only the initial page shell for Instagram with no visible main content. The page includes a splash screen with the Instagram logo and loads resources dynamically. The actual page content (feeds, posts, navigation) is rendered client-side via JavaScript after the initial page load.
with: This is the initial HTML page shell for Instagram.
The page contains a splash screen with loading indicators.
Resources are loaded from static.cdninstagram.com CDN.
The page uses React for client-side rendering.
Actual content is rendered dynamically after page load.
